zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Birch於1556年出生在英國戴文奧維爾時，她的父親John Birch22歲，母親Alice Loggesden28歲。她於1580年10月10日與John Fairfax在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可斯藍尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年4月13日享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Birch于1556年出生在英国戴文奧維爾时，她的父亲John Birch22岁，母亲Alice Loggesden28岁。她于1580年10月10日与John Fairfax在英国英格兰諾福爾可可斯藍尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年4月13日享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Birch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: topographic name for someone who lived by a birch tree or in a birch wood, from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘birch’ (Old English birce, byrce ‘birch’, Middle High German birche, Old Danish birk). In some cases the German and English name may be derived from any of the places called with this word, such as Birch in Aargau (see Birke ) or Birch in Essex. In Swedish, the name is in many instances ornamental.

variants.name: Birke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Ethiopian Lakew, Mesfin, Sisay.
North German: variant of   Birk   2. Compare   Birkey  .
Germanized form of Sorbian Běrk (see Berk ) or of its cognate Běrka (see Berka ). Compare Birkey .

variants.name: Britch
meanings: English (Lancashire): metathesized form of   Birch  . There has been some confusion with   Brick  .
English (Lancashire): nickname from Middle English briche ‘frail, humble’ (Old English bryce) or brīche ‘useful, helpful’ (Old English brȳce).
Americanized form of South German Britsch or of its variant Brütsch.

variants.name: Burkin
meanings: English: variant of Birkin, a habitational name from the parish of Birkin in Yorkshire, so named with Old English bircen ‘birch grove’, a derivative of birce ‘birch’ (see Birch ), influenced by Old Scandinavian birki. The surname Birkin had presumably migrated to southern England by the 16th century.

variants.name: Burch
meanings: German; Dutch (Van der Burch): variant of Burg .

variants.name: Birk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Udo, Bernd, Bernhardt, Gerhard, Gerhart, Hans, Hedwig, Karlheinz, Klaus, Kurt, Manfred, Otto.
Danish, Swedish, and northern English: variant of   Birch  .
North German: habitational name from any of various places called Birk, Birke, or Birken.

variants.name: Burks
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Birks in Cumberworth (Yorkshire) or from a minor place of this name in another county, named from Middle English birkes, berkes ‘the birches’. If from Staffordshire, the name may be a variant of Birch .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Birch was born in 1556, in Offwell, Devon, England, her father, John Birch, was 22 and her mother, Alice Loggesden, was 28. She married John Fairfax on 10 October 1580, in Coslany, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died on 13 April 1615, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Birch est née en 1556, à Offwell, Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Birch, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Loggesden, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Fairfax le 10 octobre 1580, à Coslany, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1615, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Birch 1556 in Offwell, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Birch 22 und ihre Mutter Alice Loggesden 28. Sie hat am 10. Oktober 1580 in Coslany, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom John Fairfax geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. April 1615 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Birch è nata il nel 1556 nel Offwell, Devon, England, sua padre, John Birch, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Alice Loggesden, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Fairfax il 10 ottobre 1580, nel Coslany, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1615, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Birchが1556年にイギリスデボンオフウエルで生まれた時，父John Birchは22歳，母Alice Loggesdenは28歳であった。1580年10月10日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクコスラニーでJohn Fairfaxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年4月13日に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Birch(이)가 1556년 영국 데폰 프웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Birch(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Loggesden(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1580년 10월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 코슬랜이에서 John Fairfax(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 4월 13일 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Birch nasceu em 1556, em Offwell, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Birch, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice Loggesden, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Fairfax em 10 de outubro de 1580, em Coslany, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de abril de 1615, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Birch родилась в 1556 г. в местности оффвелл, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Birch было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Loggesden, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fairfax 10 октября 1580 г. в местности кослани, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 13 апреля 1615 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Birch nació en 1556, en Offwell, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John Birch, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice Loggesden, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Fairfax el 10 de octubre de 1580, en Coslany, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1615, a la edad de 59 años.
